# False positive samples — must NOT trigger secret-scan.

# Empty assignments
password = ""
secret = ""
api_key = ""

# Short values (under 8 chars)
password = "abc"

# Normal base64 strings (no AKIA prefix)
dGhpcyBpcyBhIHRlc3Q=

# Common identifiers that look like keys but aren't
ghp_short
AKIA-not-quite
